description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a modern, fitted jacket with a high collar and layered, angular design elements. The figure wears slim pants and distinctive, thick-soled shoes, with yellow accents running along the edges of the clothing and footwear. He sports sunglasses and has a short, flat-top hairstyle, giving him a contemporary, urban look. The figure is posed in a dynamic, mid-stride running motion, with one arm bent forward and the other back, suggesting movement and alertness. Accessories include fingerless gloves and what appear to be small handheld devices or tools in both hands. The overall appearance is sleek and athletic, suitable for a fast-paced city environment.
description: A stylized adult male in modern, angular urban attire with sunglasses, gloves, and dynamic running posture. The figure features yellow-accented clothing and thick-soled shoes, exuding a sleek, athletic vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's sunglasses, high-collared jacket, and forward arm motion, highlighting facial features and chest details.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizes the running pose, bent arm, and the layered jacket design, with the shoe's thick sole visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, pants, and shoes, as well as the figure's posture and hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the opposite arm and leg positions, and the angular cut of the jacket.
attribute_clothing_type: modern fitted jacket with high collar, slim pants, fingerless gloves, and thick-soled shoes
attribute_posture: running stride with arms bent and one leg forward
